title: Nikkei Beef Lomo Saltado
description: A Peruvian-inspired stir-fry dish combining beef strips with crispy onions and robust flavors.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the beef and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove the beef from the skillet and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil to the skillet.
Add the onion and red bell pepper and cook until the vegetables are tender-crisp, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the soy sauce, salt, and black pepper to the skillet and stir to combine.
Return the beef to the skillet and stir to combine with the vegetables and sauce.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the beef is coated in the sauce.
Serve the beef and vegetables hot, garnished with crispy onions.
